transcription.stage: [The episode begins in the Candy Kingdom, Jake is playfully chasing Lady Rainicorn.]

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Yeah, you think you're pretty way up there but I can get you! [he stretches to be on Lady's level.]

sp.speaker: Lady Rainicorn:
sp.dialog: 나 잡아봐봐~ ("Catch me if you can.")

transcription.stage: [Finn and Princess Bubblegum are in a cemetery with a table full of different chemicals.]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Alright. Let me just add three more drops of explosive diarrhea.

transcription.stage: [She adds the explosive diarrhea and a giant cloud shaped like a skull puffs out. Not a good omen.]

sp.speaker: Finn and Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Oooo...

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Hey Princess Bubblegum, when we bring the dead back to life, will it be filled with worms?

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: No. If my decorpsinator serum works, all the dead Candy People will look as young and healthy as you do.

transcription.stage: [Finn does a "Tarzan-yell" while hitting his hands against his chest.]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Pick up that platter, tough guy.

transcription.stage: [Finn picks up a serving platter and open the lid, revealing a Candy Person corpse.]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Old Mr. Cream Puff?

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: [Giggles] We used to date. [Applies the serum.]

transcription.stage: [Mr. Cream Puff's corpse starts to glow and overflow with the fizzing serum.]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Something's happening! Come on, come on...

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Work.

transcription.stage: [A zombie Mr. Cream Puff arises and moans.]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Algebraic!

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Wait, something's wrong.

sp.speaker: Zombie Mr. Cream Puff:
sp.dialog: Sugar! [Squirts serum out of his eyes and mouth]

sp.speaker: Finn and Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Ew!

transcription.stage: [Zombie Mr. Cream Puff leaps into a giant test tube. The test tube falls and infects the whole cemetery. Zombie Candy People begin to arise from their graves.]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Hey, look, the decorpsinator serum is working!

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: No, this is wrong. They're not coming back to life--they're still dead! The decorpsinator serum--it's incomplete! [she rubs the head of a candy person that looks like a love heart.]

sp.speaker: Zombie Love Heart:
sp.dialog: [lashing out at Princess Bubblegum] Rah. Must eat sugar!

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: [Pushes him back down] You're grounded, Mister.

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Oh, this is really bad. They're going to be attracted to the Candy Kingdom!

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Why?

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Because the Candy People are made of sugar, ya ding dong!

sp.speaker: Zombie Mr. Cream Puff:
sp.dialog: [On Princess Bubblegum] Gimme some sugar, baby.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Chew on this! [Kicks him]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: [Giggles] Good one, Finn. Quickly, to the kingdom!

transcription.stage: [They run out of the cemetery]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: [Kicks another zombie] Get a life!

transcription.stage: [Princess Bubblegum is at the top of her castle, ringing a large bell]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: All citizens of the Candy Kingdom! Report to the palace, immediately!

transcription.stage: [Candy People mumble in confusion and walk to the palace]

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Whoa!

transcription.stage: [Jake and Lady go off to the palace. Princess Bubblegum notices the zombies slowly leaving the cemetery.]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: [worried] Hurry, sweet citizens.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Alright, you heard the princess, everyone in! Alright, no pushing, come on!

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Dude, what's up?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: The princess will explain everything. Tree Trunks, get those hot buns in here, girl.

sp.speaker: Tree Trunks:
sp.dialog: [Carrying hot cross buns] Oh, I hope it's not bad news.

transcription.stage: [Princess Bubblegum and Finn close the door]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Did we get everyone?

sp.speaker: Manfried:
sp.dialog: All present and accounted for.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Thanks, Manfried.

sp.speaker: Manfried:
sp.dialog: You're welcome.

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Citizens, we are assembled here in the candy foyer for a momentous announcement. Tonight we are all going to have... a slumber party!

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: What?!

transcription.stage: [Crowd cheers]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Wait! What about the zom--?! [Princess Bubblegum covers his mouth]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Go ahead and start partying.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: [Voice muffled] But, Princess, the Undead--

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: [Carries Finn to the lab] We'll be right back, everyone.

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Whooo!

transcription.stage: [In the lab]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Finn, the Candy People can't know about the zombies.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Wha?!

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: If they knew, they would flip out.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: What do you mean "flip out"?

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: I mean they would flip out.

transcription.stage: [Scene changes to the cemetery; Starchy arrives with a shovel.]

sp.speaker: Starchy:
sp.dialog: Princess? It's me, Starchy the gravedigger. I brought you a larger corpse shovel. Oh, Princess? Well, I'll just wait for you here, then. By the mausoleum. With my back turned. And my defenses lowered.

transcription.stage: [As Starchy does so, Candy Zombie comes out of the mausoleum and goes up to Starchy, Starchy starts to scream and gasp and then... KABOOM!!! He explodes in a flash of light. Back at the castle.]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Candy People explode when they get scared?!

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Not telling the Candy People about the zombies is so important that you need to promise, Royal Promise, not to let anyone find out about the zombies, ever.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Okay, sure.

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: No, Finn. You have to Royal Promise.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Yes, [kneels] I Royal Promise.

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Now I must cloister myself in the lab and finish the equation to my decorpsinator serum. You keep the candy folk distracted and ignorant. Can you do that?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Yes, your highness.

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Good. Don't tell anyone about the zombies. Never ever. [She leaves]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: No, wait. Can I at least tell [Jake enters] Jake?

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Tell me about what, dude?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: You know, about the outbreak of zom-- [Covers his mouth]

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: [Chuckles] Alright, what's going on?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Uhh, nothing at all, buddy! [Laughs awkwardly and skips into the foyer]

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Hey, dude. I think you and Bubblegum are up to something.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: [nervously] Ahha ah, what? No, no way.

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Whoa, you guys are up to something. Is it some sort of prank? Can I get in on it?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: [To party-goers] Who wants to play "Truth or Dare"?

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Hmm...

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Ok, Chocoberry, you may ask someone to tell a deep truth or a saucy dare.

sp.speaker: Chocoberry:
sp.dialog: Mr. Cupcake, truth or dare?

sp.speaker: Mr. Cupcake:
sp.dialog: Dare.

sp.speaker: Chocoberry:
sp.dialog: I dare you to take off your wrapper.

transcription.stage: [Everyone goes "Oooh"]

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: [Shoulders Finn] Hey seriously, man. I'm your bro. Bros are supposed to tell bros everything all the time. What are you and Bubblegum up to? Is everything alright?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Yep! Fine! Everything is great! Heh, heh. [Crinkling sound] Except for that. Whoa.

transcription.stage: [Mr. Cupcake has shed his wrapper]

sp.speaker: Peppermint Butler:
sp.dialog: I didn't know he was chocolate.

sp.speaker: Mr. Cupcake:
sp.dialog: Jake, truth or dare?

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Truth.

sp.speaker: Mr. Cupcake:
sp.dialog: Do you prefer chocolate or fudge?

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: I can't eat chocolate or fudge 'cause I'm a dog and they'd probably kill me, but hmmmmm probably... neither. Finn! Truth or dare?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Dare! Haha!

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: I dare you... to tell me the truth about what's going on in your mind. What were you and Bubblegum talking about when you were alone together?

transcription.stage: [Everybody goes "Oooh"]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: [Nervously] Umm, ahh, the truth is, ahhh...

transcription.stage: [Finn visualizes Princess Bubblegum's face on Jake]

sp.speaker: Hallucination of Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: You promised you wouldn't freakin' tell anyone! Oh, you're so cute, Finn.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Ahhh... the truth is... that I'd rather play Dodge Socks!

transcription.stage: [Finn throws a sock at Jake, Princess Bubblegum's face goes away]

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: I'm not playing dodge socks 'til you stop dodging my questions. Hey... [Sniffs socks] Old Mr. Cream Puff? Isn't he dead?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Hey, give me my sock back! Dodge Socks was a bad idea!

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Whoa. [angrily] Look dude, just tell me what's up, 'cause you are crazier than a cannonball tonight.

transcription.stage: [Finn looks out a window behind Jake and sees the zombies coming]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: [Thinking] Oh, my goodness! Princess hasn't finished the equation and the zombies are here!

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: I, uh, she just want this slumber party to be super fun, and if I did have something to tell you, then I would in a second, and it would make my life easier, unless there was something stopping me, like a promise, but there isn't, so I won't, so it's cool.

transcription.stage: [Zombie arises by the window behind Jake]

sp.speaker: Zombie:
sp.dialog: Sugar!

transcription.stage: [Finn shuts the shutters]

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: What? You lost me.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Umm... Hey, you know what time it is?

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Adventure time?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: No, time for Seven Minutes in Heaven! You're first.

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Really?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Lady Rainicorn! In the closet with Jake!

sp.speaker: Lady:
sp.dialog: 뭐? 나? 웃겨 정말. 그래, 좋아. 하자. ("What? Me? You gotta be kidding me. Okay, then. I'll play.")

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Okay, okay, alright. [Closet door closes on Jake and Lady] But in seven minutes, I'm gonna come out and make you spill your beans, Finn.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: I can't hear you all the way in heaven!

transcription.stage: [Finn looks out a window, a horde of zombies shouting "Sugar" comes and begins banging on door]

sp.speaker: Chet:
sp.dialog: Umm, does anyone else hear that?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: What? Hear what? I, I don't hear anything.

transcription.stage: [Candy People begin to murmur as they too hear the banging.]

sp.speaker: Chet:
sp.dialog: I hear something I don't understand... and it makes me scared! [Begins to shake.]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: What? No, Chet. Everybody, wait. What noise? You mean this noise? [Turns on a radio and party lights comes on.]

sp.speaker: Chet:
sp.dialog: Oh. [Laughs]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Yeah! Dance it! Bust it up! Uh! Uh! Uh! Oh!

transcription.stage: [A zombie comes out of the main door, Finn rushes to the door, grabbing a table]

sp.speaker: Chocoberry:
sp.dialog: What is this game you are playing at now, Finn?

transcription.stage: [Finn barricades the door with the table]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Uhh, it's... Blockado. Haha, the game of barricades. Come on, let's block all the entrances and windows!

transcription.stage: [Candy People cheer and begin blockading the doors and windows before the zombies can come in]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Alright, this is not a permanent solution. Think Finn, how can you keep everyone from finding out?

sp.speaker: Manfried:
sp.dialog: Find out about what, Finn?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Manfried, the talking piñata! Your convenient appearance gives me a great idea. Everyone, grab a stick! New game! We're gonna smash some piñatas!

sp.speaker: Manfried:
sp.dialog: What?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Except for you, Manfried.

sp.speaker: Manfried:
sp.dialog: Oh, thank goodness.

transcription.stage: [Finn takes some strips off of Taffy Girl]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Now everybody don these blindfolds. [Whispering] Thanks, Taffy Girl.

transcription.stage: [Finn runs into the middle of the blindfolded Candy People swinging sticks]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Alright, everybody, get together. I'm hanging the piñatas... [The zombies burst through the barricades] They're all around you. Smash the piñatas!

transcription.stage: [Finn and the Candy People smash all the zombies]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Yeah! You guys are on fire!

transcription.stage: [Chocoberry smashes a zombie, causing candy to fall out. She kneels down and licks the candy.]

sp.speaker: Chocoberry:
sp.dialog: Oh, it is so tasty.

transcription.stage: [All the Candy Zombies are smashed and the Candy People are eating their candy]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Yes! We did it! My improbable plan worked!

transcription.stage: [Jake and Lady come out of the closet]

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Whew!

sp.speaker: Lady:
sp.dialog: 안녕! ("Hello!")

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Seven minutes up yet? [Grabs a jelly filled doughnut and eats it, noticing the zombie corpses.] Whoa! [Runs to Finn] What the nuts happened here?!

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Oh, we killed all the zombies that Princess Bubblegum and I raised from the dead.

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Really!?

transcription.stage: [Time freezes, leaving only Finn moving in the room.]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Jake? What's going on?

transcription.stage: [Princess Bubblegum enters, unaffected by the freezing.]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: What? Huh? Oh, Finn! Did you break your Royal Promise?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Yeah, but, I mean, all the zombies are dead. The Candy People won't freak out. What's the big deal?

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: This is really, really bad, Finn. You can't break Royal Promises. Never, ever, never. No matter what, forever.

transcription.stage: [The room starts shaking]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: The Guardians of the Royal Promise are coming for us.

transcription.stage: [A hand bursts through the ceiling and grabs Finn and Princess Bubblegum and pulls them outside]

sp.speaker: Finn and Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Whoa!

sp.speaker: Guardian 1:
sp.dialog: Finn the Human. You have broken a Royal Promise for which the penalty is trial by fire.

transcription.stage: [Guardian 2 breathes fire]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: That's stupid.

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Wait! He's my friend! Isn't there another option?!

sp.speaker: Guardian 1:
sp.dialog: Yes. Because you care for the promise-breaker, we will give him a less hot trial. You must now answer...

sp.speaker: Guardian 2:
sp.dialog: ...Math questions!

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Mathematical!

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Finn, you're terrible at math.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Awww.

sp.speaker: Guardian 1:
sp.dialog: Now, solve this! [Puts Finn in front of Guardian 2, who puts up a hologram of an overly complicated math equation]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Uhh....

sp.speaker: Guardian 2:
sp.dialog: Oh, wait, wait, I thought of a better one. [Replaces the equation with one that says "2+2"]

sp.speaker: Guardian 1:
sp.dialog: Yes! Two plus two. Solve it or die.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Uhh. Four, right?

transcription.stage: [Guardians laugh]

sp.speaker: Guardian 1:
sp.dialog: Oh, correct.

transcription.stage: [Guardians heads explode and time rewinds, night becomes day, Guardian 2's head comes back and he talks backwards and goes back to sitting and blowing bubbles around the Candy Kingdom.]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: What's happening, Princess?

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: You've defeated the broken royal promise! The Gumball Guardians are resetting!

transcription.stage: [Guardian 1 drops Finn and Princess Bubblegum, who teleport back to Princess Bubblegum's lab]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Slamacow! That was tops! Who's not good at math? I was all "Four!"

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Four, four... Four, four, four... That's it! The answer was so simple, I was too smart to see it!

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: You're welcome!

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: '4' is the last figure I need to perfect my decorpsinator serum.

transcription.stage: [In the foyer, Princess Bubblegum pours the serum on a zombie]

sp.speaker: Revived Zombie:
sp.dialog: Golly!

transcription.stage: [Finn and Princess Bubblegum pour the serum on all the zombies]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Woohoo! Yeah!

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: This is messed up, but sweet.

sp.speaker: Lady Rainicorn:
sp.dialog: 진짜로. ("Truly it is.")

transcription.stage: [Finn and Princess Bubblegum revive more Candy Zombies]

sp.speaker: Candy Person 1:
sp.dialog: Uncle Chewy!

sp.speaker: Candy Person 2:
sp.dialog: Grandma!

sp.speaker: Ice Cream Lady:
sp.dialog: Former dead relative!

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: Starchy!

sp.speaker: Starchy:
sp.dialog: Mornin'.

sp.speaker: Jake:
sp.dialog: [Walks over to Finn] Man, you broke a Royal Promise? You're nuts. All you had to do is say that it was a royal secret. I know what's up. [Walks away from Finn.]

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: I hope you grasp the full consequences of breaking promises.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Heck yeah! If I break a Royal Promise, I get to fight zombies, throw slumber parties, awake Gumball Guardians and... and...

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Alright, alright.

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: [evilly] And reverse death itself!

sp.speaker: Princess Bubblegum:
sp.dialog: Oh, you are adorable. But keep your promises, okay?

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: I will, Princess.

transcription.stage: [Finn notices Starchy gnawing on his leg and picks him up]

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: Starchy, you're not a zombie.

sp.speaker: Starchy:
sp.dialog: I can't help it. Flesh is delicious!

sp.speaker: Finn:
sp.dialog: You're delicious!

sp.speaker: Starchy:
sp.dialog: Don't squeeze me! I'll fart!

transcription.stage: [Finn squeezes him, Starchy farts]
Episodes ends
